name: listingview-pp-mcp
description: Every ListingView research tool in your terminal, plus a local database that adds drift tracking, niche scoring, and offline analysis no ListingView tool keeps.

listingview_cookies.title: LISTINGVIEW_COOKIES
listingview_cookies.description: Optional. Sets LISTINGVIEW_COOKIES for the ListingView MCP server.

listingview_shop_id.title: LISTINGVIEW_SHOP_ID
listingview_shop_id.description: Optional. Sets LISTINGVIEW_SHOP_ID for the ListingView MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
